title: The Four Days of Naples
writer: Pasquale Festa Campanile, Massimo Franciosa, Nanni Loy
actors: Raffaele Barbato, Charles Belmont, Regina Bianchi
plot: The film shows the history of the Neapolitan popular revolt against the invading Germans during World War II. During the four days in Naples, the revolt turns over in just a few hours. Neapolitans slung on rifles and guns or armed...
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 9 wins & 9 nominations total
